{{Short description|2014 film festival in Berlin, Germany}} {{Use dmy dates|date=September 2019}} {{Infobox film festival | name = 64th Berlin International Film Festival | image = 64BIFFPoster.jpg | caption = Festival poster | opening = ''[[The Grand Budapest Hotel]]'' | closing = ''[[Black Coal, Thin Ice]]'' | location = [[Berlin]], Germany | founded = 1951 | awards = [[Golden Bear]]:
''[[Black Coal, Thin Ice]]'' | host = [[Anke Engelke]] | number = 395 films | date = 6–16 February 2014 | website = http://www.berlinale.de | chronology = Berlin International Film Festival | preceded_by = [[63rd Berlin International Film Festival|63rd]] | followed_by = [[65th Berlin International Film Festival|65th]] }} The '''64th''' annual '''[[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 6 to 16 February 2014.{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2014/01_jahresblatt_2014/01_jahresblatt_2014.html |title=64TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 06 - 16, 2014 |access-date=15 November 2013 |work=berlinale.de}} [[Wes Anderson]]'s film ''[[The Grand Budapest Hotel]]'' opened the festival.{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-26080757 |title=Wes Anderson opens Berlin film festival to rave reviews |access-date=7 February 2014 |work=BBC News|date=7 February 2014 }} British film director [[Ken Loach]] was presented with the [[Golden Bear#Golden Bear .E2.80.93 Honorary Award|Honorary Golden Bear]].{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-26190049 |title=Ken Loach gets lifetime award in Berlin |access-date=14 February 2014 |work=BBC News|date=14 February 2014 }} The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to the Chinese film ''[[Black Coal, Thin Ice]]'' directed by [[Diao Yinan]], which also served as closing film.{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2014/03_preistraeger_2014/03_preistraeger_2014.html |title=Prizes of the International Jury |access-date=16 February 2014 |work=berlinale.de |archive-date=11 February 2015 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150211013009/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2014/03_preistraeger_2014/03_preistraeger_2014.html |url-status=dead }}{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-26211896 |title=Chinese film wins Best Picture at Berlin film festival |newspaper=BBC |date=15 February 2014 |access-date=15 February 2014}} == ==Official Awards== [[File:James Schamus Berlinale 2014.jpg|thumb|200px|[[James Schamus]], Jury President]]The following prizes were awarded:{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/64_ifb/64_Berlinale_Awards.pdf |title=64th Berlin International Film Festival Awards|access-date=6 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de}} === Main Competition === * [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Black Coal, Thin Ice]]'' by [[Diao Yinan]] * [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]: ''[[The Grand Budapest Hotel]]'' by [[Wes Anderson]] * [[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: ''[[Life of Riley (2014 film)|Life of Riley]]'' by [[Alain Resnais]] * [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Richard Linklater]] for ''[[Boyhood (2014 film)|Boyhood]]'' * [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Haru Kuroki]] for ''[[The Little House (2014 film)|The Little House]]'' * [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Liao Fan]] for ''[[Black Coal, Thin Ice]]'' * [[Silver Bear for Best Screenplay]]: ''[[Stations of the Cross (film)|Stations of the Cross]]'' by [[Dietrich Brüggemann]] * '''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': ''[[Blind Massage]]'' by [[Lou Ye]] (Cinematography) === [[Golden Bear#Golden Bear .E2.80.93 Honorary Award|Honorary Golden Bear]] === * [[Ken Loach]] === Best First Feature Award === * ''[[Güeros]]'' by [[Alonso Ruizpalacios]] ==
